---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow, action, integration, or UI improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What frontend workflow is painful today?

Example: "I keep copying console errors and failed network requests into AI chat."

## Proposed Solution

What should cc-devtools do?

## Target Workflow

- [ ] Inspect
- [ ] Debug
- [ ] Selector
- [ ] QA
- [ ] Local Data Patch
- [ ] New workflow

## Example Prompt

```text
Paste the user prompt you want cc-devtools to handle.
```

## Expected Evidence or Output

What should the agent return or change?

## Alternatives

What tools or manual steps do you use now?
